description: Designing and deploying an agentic AI platform supporting workflow orchestration, multi-step reasoning, and tool-based execution.
bullets: Designed and deployed an agentic AI platform supporting workflow orchestration, multi-step reasoning, and tool-based execution.
Integrated Meta WhatsApp Business API (WABA) to automate customer interactions with webhook-driven message processing.
Built AI tools for knowledge retrieval, API execution, and structured action handling (handover, labeling, follow-ups).
Managed Docker-based deployments, server configuration, and production releases to ensure scalable and reliable environments.
